title: Sri Krishnarjuna Yudham
writer: Pingali Nagendra Rao, Kadiri Venkata Reddy
actors: N.T. Rama Rao, Akkineni Nageswara Rao, Saroja Devi B.
plot: After vanquishing the army of the Kauravas, the Pandava Brothers preside over Indraprastha, and Arjun takes a journey to worship Lord Shiva. It is during this journey that he will challenge celestial sage Narad that no one on Eart...
